8:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"docker run -p 8080:8080   -v $(pwd)/memory.db:/data/memory.db   mnemosyne/server:latest\n","language":"bash"}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Authentication"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":["All endpoints require an API key via the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"X-API-Key"}]," header:"]}]
b:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"curl -H \"X-API-Key: your-key\" http://localhost:8080/health\n","language":"bash"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Configure keys via environment variable:"}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"export MNEMOSYNE_API_KEYS=key1,key2,key3\n","language":"bash"}]
e:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Endpoints"}]
f:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Health Check"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"GET /health\n\n# Response:\n{\n\"status\": \"healthy\",\n\"version\": \"2.0.0\",\n\"db_connected\": true,\n\"working_count\": 42,\n\"episodic_count\": 128,\n}\n","language":"bash"}]
11:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Remember"}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"POST /remember\nContent-Type: application/json\n\n{\n\"content\": \"User prefers dark mode.\",\n\"tags\": [\"preferences\", \"ui\"],\n\"importance\": 0.8,\n\"source\": \"conversation\"\n}\n\n# Response:\n{\n\"id\": \"mem_abc123\",\n\"status\": \"stored\"\n}\n","language":"bash"}]
13:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Recall"}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"POST /recall\nContent-Type: application/json\n\n{\n\"query\": \"user preferences\",\n\"top_k\": 5,\n\"tags\": [\"preferences\"]\n}\n\n# Response:\n{\n\"results\": [\n  {\n    \"id\": \"mem_abc123\",\n    \"content\": \"User prefers dark mode.\",\n    \"score\": 0.95,\n    \"tags\": [\"preferences\", \"ui\"]\n  }\n],\n\"total\": 1\n}\n","language":"bash"}]
15:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Get Memory"}]
16:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"GET /memory/{id}\n\n# Response:\n{\n\"id\": \"mem_abc123\",\n\"content\": \"User prefers dark mode.\",\n\"tags\": [\"preferences\", \"ui\"],\n\"importance\": 0.8,\n\"created_at\": \"2026-04-25T14:30:00Z\"\n}\n","language":"bash"}]
17:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Update Memory"}]
18:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"PUT /memory/{id}\nContent-Type: application/json\n\n{\n\"content\": \"User prefers dark mode and large fonts.\",\n\"importance\": 0.9\n}\n","language":"bash"}]
19:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Delete Memory"}]
1a:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"DELETE /memory/{id}\n\n# Response: 204 No Content\n","language":"bash"}]
1b:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Add Fact"}]
1c:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"POST /facts\nContent-Type: application/json\n\n{\n\"subject\": \"Alice\",\n\"predicate\": \"prefers_language\",\n\"object\": \"Go\",\n\"confidence\": 0.95\n}\n\n# Response:\n{\n\"id\": \"fact_xyz789\",\n\"status\": \"stored\"\n}\n","language":"bash"}]
1d:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Query Facts"}]
1e:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"GET /facts?subject=Alice&current_only=true\n\n# Response:\n{\n\"facts\": [\n  {\n    \"id\": \"fact_xyz789\",\n    \"subject\": \"Alice\",\n    \"predicate\": \"prefers_language\",\n    \"object\": \"Go\",\n    \"confidence\": 0.95\n  }\n]\n}\n","language":"bash"}]
1f:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Statistics"}]
20:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"GET /stats\n\n# Response:\n{\n\"working_count\": 42,\n\"episodic_count\": 128,\n\"semantic_count\": 64,\n\"db_size_mb\": 12.5,\n\"last_sleep_at\": \"2026-04-25T13:00:00Z\"\n}\n","language":"bash"}]
